name: io.github.codespar/mcp-nupay
description: MCP server for NuPay — Nubank's merchant checkout rail. Pix + NuPay wallet one-click checkout backed by Nubank's 100M+ BR customer distribution.

environmentVariables.name: NUPAY_MERCHANT_KEY
environmentVariables.description: NuPay X-Merchant-Key issued to your merchant

environmentVariables.name: NUPAY_MERCHANT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: NuPay X-Merchant-Token issued to your merchant

environmentVariables.name: NUPAY_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: OAuth2/CIBA client_id for pre-authorized (recurrence) flows. Optional unless using backchannel_start / backchannel_complete.

environmentVariables.name: NUPAY_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: OAuth2/CIBA client_secret for pre-authorized flows. Optional unless using backchannel_* tools.

environmentVariables.name: NUPAY_ENV
environmentVariables.description: sandbox | production. Defaults to sandbox. Drives both checkout API and auth base URLs.
